# Summary

Carrot protocol suffered significant losses from Drift protocol exploit, facing ~50% CRT price decline to ~$57.55. Mint/redeem functions paused pending clarity. ONyc position closures temporarily blocked due to Jupiter router issues, now resolved. All funds remain safe; Boost and Turbo products unaffected.

tweets.fullText:
1/ Update on Carrot 

We have been in touch with the @project0 team, and expect that we will see a 2% drawdown on the $781k PYUSD balance that was deposited there before the exploit, for an additional loss of $15.6k

This we expect will adjust the CRT price to $57.5466
tweets.aiAnalysis:
# Analysis

**Why it underperformed:** The tweet is a dry, numbers-heavy update lacking emotional resonance or visual hierarchy. While it contains specificity (exact figures: $781k, $15.6k, $57.5466), these granular metrics feel procedural rather than compelling—they read as an internal memo rather than content designed for engagement. The thread format (marked "1/") without a hook in the opening sentence fails to create curiosity or urgency that would drive clicks through to subsequent tweets. No image, no narrative tension, and the relevance is narrowly scoped to Carrot holders experiencing losses.

If you still have issues please open a ticket in discord and we’ll assist.
